min_count);\n494\t        assert!(max_count <= 30, \"Maximum shard count too high: {}\", max_count);\n495\t    }\n496\t}\n497\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"f246d8dc-b560-40b7-9e48-f30b15e4af12","uuid":"875a04f2-eea2-40e8-a348-a84859fbbfb1","timestamp":"2026-05-09T19:26:14.186Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/miroir/crates/miroir-proxy/src/routes/documents.rs","content":"//! Document routes: POST, PUT, DELETE, GET /documents\n//!\n//! Implements the write path per plan §2:\n//! - Hash primary key to get shard ID\n//! - Inject _miroir_shard field\n//! - Fan out to RG × RF nodes\n//! - Per-group quorum (floor(RF/2)+1)\n//! - X-Miroir-Degraded header on any group missing quorum\n//! - 503 miroir_no_quorum only when no group met quorum\n\nuse axum::{\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    http::{HeaderMap, HeaderValue, StatusCode},\n    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n};\nuse miroir_core::{\n    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    router::{shard_for_key, write_targets},\n    scatter::{Scatter, ScatterRequest},\n};\nuse serde_json::Value;\n\nuse crate::{\n    error_response::ErrorResponse,\n    scatter::HttpScatter,\n    state::ProxyState,\n};\n\n/// Documents router.\npub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n    axum::Router::new()\n        .route(\"/:index\", axum::routing::post(add_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::post(add_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::put(update_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents\", axum::routing::delete(delete_documents))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents/:id\", axum::routing::get(get_document))\n        .route(\"/:index/documents/:id\", axum::routing::delete(delete_document))\n}\n\n/// Extract the primary key field from documents or headers.\n/// First checks the index settings, then falls back to headers and defaults.\nasync fn get_primary_key(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    index: &str,\n    documents: &[Value],\n    headers: &HeaderMap,\n) -> Result<String, ErrorResponse> {\n    // First, try to get primary key from index settings\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}\", index),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            if let Ok(result) = scatter.scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await {\n                if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                    if resp.status == 200 {\n                        if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n                            if let Some(pk) = json.get(\"primaryKey\").and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {\n                                return Ok(pk.to_string());\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Check for primary key in query string/header\n    if let Some(pk) = headers.get(\"X-Meiroil-Primary-Key\") {\n        if let Ok(pk_str) = pk.to_str() {\n            return Ok(pk_str.to_string());\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Try to infer from first document\n    if let Some(doc) = documents.first() {\n        // Common primary key field names to try\n        for candidate in &[\"id\", \"Id\", \"ID\", \"_id\", \"key\", \"Key\", \"pk\"] {\n            if doc.get(*candidate).is_some() {\n                return Ok(candidate.to_string());\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Default to \"id\"\n    Ok(\"id\".to_string())\n}\n\n/// POST /:index/documents - Add or replace documents.\nasync fn add_documents(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    headers: HeaderMap,\n    Json(body): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Get primary key for the index\n    let primary_key = get_primary_key(&state, &index, &body, &headers).await?;\n\n    // Inject _miroir_shard into each document and group by shard\n    let mut docs_by_shard: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for mut doc in body {\n        let pk_value = doc\n            .get(primary_key.as_str())\n            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n            .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(format!(\"Missing primary key field '{primary_key}'\")))?;\n\n        let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, state.config.shards);\n\n        // Inject _miroir_shard field\n        if let Some(obj) = doc.as_object_mut() {\n            obj.insert(\"_miroir_shard\".to_string(), Value::Number(shard_id.into()));\n        }\n\n        docs_by_shard.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(doc);\n    }\n\n    // For each shard, scatter write to all RG × RF nodes\n    let mut all_responses: Vec<Value> = Vec::new();\n    let mut any_degraded = false;\n    let mut any_success = false;\n\n    for (shard_id, docs) in docs_by_shard {\n        let targets = write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n\n        if targets.is_empty() {\n            return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n        }\n\n        // Build request body\n        let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&docs).unwrap_or_default();\n\n        let request = ScatterRequest {\n            method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents\", index),\n            body: body_bytes,\n            headers: vec![],\n        };\n\n        let scatter = HttpScatter::with_retry_cache(\n            (*state.client).clone(),\n            state.config.server.request_timeout_ms,\n            (*state.retry_cache).clone(),\n        );\n        let result = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n            .await\n            .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n        // Check quorum per replica group\n        let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n        // Group responses by replica group\n        let mut groups: std::collections::HashMap<u32, usize> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n        for resp in &result.responses {\n            let node = topology.node(&resp.node_id).unwrap();\n            *groups.entry(node.replica_group).or_insert(0) += 1;\n        }\n\n        // Check if each group met quorum\n        for (_group_id, count) in &groups {\n            if *count < quorum {\n                any_degraded = true;\n            } else {\n                any_success = true;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Merge responses\n        for resp in result.responses {\n            if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<Value>(&resp.body) {\n                all_responses.push(json);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If no group met quorum, return 503\n    if !any_success {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(0));\n    }\n\n    // Build response with proper task UID\n    let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n        \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n        \"indexUid\": index,\n        \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n        \"type\": \"documentAdditionOrUpdate\",\n        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n    });\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(202);\n\n    // Add degraded header if any group was degraded\n    if any_degraded {\n        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder.body(Json(response_body).into_response().into_body()).unwrap())\n}\n\n/// PUT /:index/documents - Update documents.\nasync fn update_documents(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    headers: HeaderMap,\n    Json(body): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    // Same logic as POST, just different type\n    add_documents(State(state), Path(index), headers, Json(body)).await\n}\n\n/// DELETE /:index/documents - Delete documents by batch.\nasync fn delete_documents(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Extract filter or IDs from request body\n    let ids = body\n        .get(\"ids\")\n        .and_then(|v| v.as_array())\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"Missing 'ids' field in delete request\"))?;\n\n    // Group by shard\n    let mut docs_by_shard: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<String>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for id_val in ids {\n        let id = id_val\n            .as_str()\n            .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"ID must be a string\"))?;\n\n        let shard_id = shard_for_key(id, state.config.shards);\n        docs_by_shard.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(id.to_string());\n    }\n\n    // For each shard, scatter delete to all RG × RF nodes\n    let mut any_degraded = false;\n    let mut any_success = false;\n\n    for (shard_id, ids) in docs_by_shard {\n        let targets = write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n\n        if targets.is_empty() {\n            return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n        }\n\n        let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&serde_json::json!({ \"ids\": ids })).unwrap_or_default();\n\n        let request = ScatterRequest {\n            method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents/delete\", index),\n            body: body_bytes,\n            headers: vec![],\n        };\n\n        let scatter = HttpScatter::with_retry_cache(\n            (*state.client).clone(),\n            state.config.server.request_timeout_ms,\n            (*state.retry_cache).clone(),\n        );\n        let result = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n            .await\n            .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n        // Check quorum per replica group\n        let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n        let mut groups: std::collections::HashMap<u32, usize> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n        for resp in &result.responses {\n            let node = topology.node(&resp.node_id).unwrap();\n            *groups.entry(node.replica_group).or_insert(0) += 1;\n        }\n\n        for (_group_id, count) in &groups {\n            if *count < quorum {\n                any_degraded = true;\n            } else {\n                any_success = true;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    if !any_success {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(0));\n    }\n\n    let task_uid = 1;\n    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n        \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n        \"indexUid\": index,\n        \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n        \"type\": \"documentDeletion\",\n        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n    });\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(202);\n\n    if any_degraded {\n        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder.body(Json(response_body).into_response().into_body()).unwrap())\n}\n\n/// DELETE /:index/documents/:id - Delete a single document.\nasync fn delete_document(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path((index, id)): Path<(String, String)>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    let shard_id = shard_for_key(&id, state.config.shards);\n    let targets = write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n\n    if targets.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n    }\n\n    let body_bytes =\n        serde_json::to_vec(&serde_json::json!({ \"ids\": [id] })).unwrap_or_default();\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents/delete\", index),\n        body: body_bytes,\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n    let result = scatter\n        .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Check quorum\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n    let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n\n    let mut groups: std::collections::HashMap<u32, usize> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n    for resp in &result.responses {\n        let node = topology.node(&resp.node_id).unwrap();\n        *groups.entry(node.replica_group).or_insert(0) += 1;\n    }\n\n    let mut any_degraded = false;\n    let mut any_success = false;\n\n    for (_group_id, count) in &groups {\n        if *count < quorum {\n            any_degraded = true;\n        } else {\n            any_success = true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    if !any_success {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::no_quorum(shard_id));\n    }\n\n    let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n        \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n        \"indexUid\": index,\n        \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n        \"type\": \"documentDeletion\",\n        \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n    });\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(202);\n\n    if any_degraded {\n        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder.body(Json(response_body).into_response().into_body()).unwrap())\n}\n\n/// GET /:index/documents/:id - Get a single document by ID.\nasync fn get_document(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path((index, id)): Path<(String, String)>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // For GET, we only need to query one replica group\n    // Use the query group (round-robin)\n    let query_seq = state.next_query_seq();\n    let group_id = miroir_core::router::query_group(query_seq, state.config.replica_groups);\n\n    let group = topology\n        .group(group_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\"Group {} not found\", group_id)))?;\n\n    let _shard_id = shard_for_key(&id, state.config.shards);\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n\n    // Build covering set for this shard\n    let covering = miroir_core::router::covering_set(1, group, rf, query_seq);\n\n    // Query the node responsible for this shard\n    let target = covering\n        .first()\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes in covering set\"))?;\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/documents/{}\", index, id),\n        body: vec![],\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n    let result = scatter\n        .scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Error)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    if result.responses.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::document_not_found(&id));\n    }\n\n    let resp = &result.responses[0];\n\n    // Parse response body as JSON and strip _miroir_shard\n    let mut body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n        .unwrap_or_else(|_| serde_json::json!({}));\n    if let Some(obj) = body.as_object_mut() {\n        obj.remove(\"_miroir_shard\");\n    }\n\n    let status = StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(StatusCode::OK);\n    Ok((status, Json(body)).into_response())\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_document_shard_hashing() {\n        // Test that same ID always maps to same shard\n        let id1 = \"test-doc-123\";\n        let id2 = \"test-doc-123\";\n        let id3 = \"different-doc\";\n\n        // These should be deterministic\n        let shard1 = shard_for_key(id1, 64);\n        let shard2 = shard_for_key(id2, 64);\n        let shard3 = shard_for_key(id3, 64);\n\n        assert_eq!(shard1, shard2, \"Same ID should map to same shard\");\n        assert_ne!(shard1, shard3, \"Different IDs should likely map to different shards\");\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_document_shard_uniformity() {\n        // Test that documents distribute reasonably evenly\n        let mut shard_counts = vec![0usize; 64];\n\n        for i in 0..1000 {\n            let id = format!(\"doc-{}\", i);\n            let shard = shard_for_key(&id, 64);\n            shard_counts[shard as usize] += 1;\n        }\n\n        // Check that each shard got at least some documents\n        // (with 1000 docs and 64 shards, most should get at least 10-20)\n        let min_count = *shard_counts.iter().min().unwrap();\n        let max_count = *shard_counts.iter().max().unwrap();\n\n        assert!(min_count >= 5, \"Minimum shard count too low: {}\", min_count);\n        assert!(max_count <= 30, \"Maximum shard count too high: {}\", max_count);\n    }\n}\n","numLines":497,"startLine":1,"totalLines":497}}}

use std::collections::HashMap;\n376\t\n377\t    let mut merged: HashMap<String, HashMap<String, u64>> = HashMap::new();\n378\t\n379\t    for dist in distributions {\n380\t        if let Some(obj) = dist.as_object() {\n381\t            for (field, value) in obj {\n382\t                if let Some(inner) = value.as_object() {\n383\t                    let entry = merged.entry(field.clone()).or_default();\n384\t                    for (k, v) in inner {\n385\t                        if let Some(count) = v.as_u64() {\n386\t .into_iter()\n399\t            .map(|(k, v)| (k, serde_json::json!(v)))\n400\t            .collect();\n401\t        result.insert(field, serde_json::json!(inner_obj));\n402\t    }\n403\t\n404\t     };\n\n        let _ = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, targets.clone(), filterable_req, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n            .await;\n    }\n\n    let body: Value = HashMap::new();\n\n    for dist in distributions {\n        if let Some(obj) = dist.as_object() {\n            for (field, value) in obj {\n                if let Some(inner) = value.as_object() {\n                    let entry = merged.entry(field.clone()).or_default();\n                    for (k, v) in inner {\n                        if let Some(count) = v.as_u64() {\n #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n81\t    ranking_score_threshold: Option<f64>,\n82\t}\n83\t\n84\t/// Attempt a search with a specific replica group.\n85\t///\n86\t/// Returns (shard_responses, any_degraded, failed_shard_ids)\n87\tasync fn search_with_group(\n88\t    state: &ProxyState,\n89\t    topology: &miroir_core::topology::Topology,\n90\t    group_id: u32,\n91\t    index: &str,\n92\t    req_body: &[u8],\n93\t    query_seq: u64,\n94\t    _limit: usize,\n95\t    _offset: usize,\n96\t    _client_requested_score: bool,\n97\t    _facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n98\t) -> Result<(Vec<CoreShardResponse>, bool, Vec<u32>), ErrorResponse> {\n99\t    let group = topology\n100\t        .group(group_id)\n101\t        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\"Group {} not found\", group_id)))?;\n102\t\n103\t    // Build covering set for all shards\n104\t    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n105\t    let shard_count = state.config.shards;\n106\t    let covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n107\t\n108\t    let request = ScatterRequest {\n109\t        method: covering.clone(), request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n119\t        .await\n120\t        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n121\t\n122\t    // Build shard responses for merger\n123\t    let mut shard_responses: Vec<CoreShardResponse> = Vec::new();\n124\t    let mut any_degraded = false;\n125\t    let mut failed_shard_ids: Vec<u32> = Vec::new();\n126\t\n127\t    // Group responses by node\n128\t    let mut responses_by_node: std::collections::HashMap<String, serde_json::Value> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n129\t\n130\t    for resp in result.responses responses_by_node.get(&node_id_str) {\n140\t            shard_responses.push(CoreShardResponse {\n141\t                shard_id: shard_id as u32,\n142\t                body: body.clone(),\n143\t                success: true,\n144\t            });\n145\t        } else {\n146\t            // No response from this node's shard\n147\t            shard_responses.push(CoreShardResponse {\n148\t                shard_id: shard_id as u32,\n149\t                body: serde_json::json!({}),\n150\t                success: false,\n151\t            });\n152\t            failed_shard_ids.push(shard_id as Search documents.\n161\tasync fn search(\n162\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n163\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n164\t    req: Json<SearchRequest>,\n165\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n166\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n167\t    let query_seq = state.next_query_seq();\n168\t\n169\t    // Extract query before moving req.0\n170\t    let query_value = group first\n181\t    let primary_group_id = query_group(query_seq, state.config.replica_groups);\n182\t    let (mut shard_responses, mut any_degraded, mut failed_shard_ids) =     offset,\n191\t        client_requested_score,\n192\t        facets.clone(),\n193\t    )\n194\t    .await?;\n195\t\n196\t    // If we have failed shards and there are other replica groups, try group fallback\n197\t    if !failed_shard_ids.is_empty() && state.config.replica_groups > 1 {\n198\t        let replica_groups = state.config.replica_groups;\n199\t        let mut fallback_attempts = 0;\n200\t        const MAX_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS: u32 = 2; // Limit fallback attempts to avoid cascading\n201\t\n202\t        // Try other groups for the failed shards\n203\t        for fallback_offset in 1..replica_groups as u64 {\n204\t            if fallback_attempts >= MAX_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS {\n205\t                break;\n206\t            }\n207\t\n208\t            let fallback_group_id = (primary_group_id as u64 + fallback_offset) % replica_groups as u64;\n209\t            if fallback_group_id == primary_group_id as u64 {\n210\t                continue;\n211\t            }\n212\t\n213\t            // Try the fallback group for all failed shards\n214\t            let (fallback_responses, fallback_degraded, fallback_failed) = search_with_group(\n215\t                &state,\n216\t                &topology,\n217\t                fallback_group_id as u32,\n218\t                &index,\n219\t                &req_body,\n220\t                query_seq,\n221\t                limit,\n222\t                offset,\n223\t                client_requested_score,\n224\t                req.facets.clone(),\n225\t            )\n226\t            .await?;\n227\t\n228\t            // Merge the successful responses from fallback into our main responses\n229\t            for (i, shard_resp) in shard_responses.iter_mut().enumerate() {\n230\t                let shard_id = i as u32;\n231\t                if !shard_resp.success && failed_shard_ids.contains(&shard_id) {\n232\t                    // Try to find a successful response from fallback\n233\t                    if      shard_resp.success = true;\n236\t                        // Remove from failed list\n237\t                        failed_shard_ids.retain(|&id| id != shard_id);\n238\t                    }\n239\t                }\n240\t            }\n241\t\n242\t            if fallback_degraded {\n243\t                any_degraded = true;\n244\t            }\n245\t\n246\t            // Update failed_shard_ids Search route: POST /indexes/:index/search\n//!\n//! Implements the read path per plan §2:\n//! - Pick group via query_seq % RG\n//! - Build intra-group covering set\n//! - Scatter search to covering set nodes\n//! - Merge by _rankingScore\n//! - Strip _miroir_shard always + _rankingScore if not requested\n//! - Aggregate facets + estimatedTotalHits\n//! - Report max processingTimeMs\n//! - Group fallback when covering set has holes\n\nuse axum::{\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    http::HeaderValue,\n    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n};\nuse miroir_core::{\n    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    merger::{Merger, MergerImpl, MergedResult, ShardResponse as CoreShardResponse},\n    router::{covering_set, query_group},\n    scatter::{Scatter, ScatterRequest},\n};\nuse serde_json::Value;\n\nuse crate::{\n    error_response::ErrorResponse,\n    scatter::HttpScatter,\n    state::ProxyState,\n};\n\n/// Search router.\npub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n    axum::Router::new().route(\"/:index/search\", axum::routing::post(search))\n}\n\n/// Search request body (Meilisearch format).\n#[derive(Debug, serde::Deserialize, serde::Serialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct SearchRequest {\n    q: Option<String>,\n    limit: Option<usize>,\n    offset: Option<usize>,\n    filter: Option<serde_json::Value>,\n    sort: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    #[serde(rename = \"attributesToRetrieve\")]\n    attributes_to_retrieve: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    #[serde(rename = \"attributesToCrop\")]\n    attributes_to_crop: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    #[serde(rename = \"cropLength\")]\n    crop_length: Option<usize>,\n    #[serde(rename = \"cropMarker\")]\n    crop_marker: Option<String>,\n    #[serde(rename = \"highlightPreTag\")]\n    highlight_pre_tag: Option<String>,\n    #[serde(rename = \"highlightPostTag\")]\n    highlight_post_tag: Option<String>,\n    #[serde(rename = \"showMatchesPosition\")]\n    show_matches_position: Option<bool>,\n    #[serde(rename = \"showRankingScore\")]\n    show_ranking_score: Option<bool>,\n    #[serde(rename = \"rankingScoreThreshold\")]\n    ranking_score_threshold: Option<f64>,\n    #[serde(rename = \"matchingStrategy\")]\n    matching_strategy: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Search response body (Meilisearch format).\n#[derive(Debug, serde::Serialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct SearchResponse {\n    hits: Vec<Value>,\n    query: String,\n    limit: usize,\n    offset: usize,\n    estimated_total_hits: u64,\n    processing_time_ms: u64,\n    facet_distribution: Option<Value>,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    ranking_score_threshold: Option<f64>,\n}\n\n/// Attempt a search with a specific replica group.\n///\n/// Returns (shard_responses, any_degraded, failed_shard_ids)\nasync fn search_with_group(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    topology: &miroir_core::topology::Topology,\n    group_id: u32,\n    index: &str,\n    req_body: &[u8],\n    query_seq: u64,\n    _limit: usize,\n    _offset: usize,\n    _client_requested_score: bool,\n    _facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n) -> Result<(Vec<CoreShardResponse>, bool, Vec<u32>), ErrorResponse> {\n    let group = topology\n        .group(group_id)\n        .ok_or_else(|| ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\"Group {} not found\", group_id)))?;\n\n    // Build covering set for all shards\n    let rf = state.config.replication_factor as usize;\n    let shard_count = state.config.shards;\n    let covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"POST\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/search\", index),\n        body: req_body.to_vec(),\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    // Scatter search to all nodes in covering set\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n    let result = scatter\n        .scatter(topology, covering.clone(), request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Build shard responses for merger\n    let mut shard_responses: Vec<CoreShardResponse> = Vec::new();\n    let mut any_degraded = false;\n    let mut failed_shard_ids: Vec<u32> = Vec::new();\n\n    // Group responses by node\n    let mut responses_by_node: std::collections::HashMap<String, serde_json::Value> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for resp in result.responses {\n        let node_id = resp.node_id.as_str().to_string();\n        responses_by_node.insert(node_id, resp.body.into());\n    }\n\n    // For each shard, find the response from its assigned node\n    for (shard_id, node_id) in covering.iter().enumerate() {\n        let node_id_str = node_id.as_str().to_string();\n\n        if let Some(body) = responses_by_node.get(&node_id_str) {\n            shard_responses.push(CoreShardResponse {\n                shard_id: shard_id as u32,\n                body: body.clone(),\n                success: true,\n            });\n        } else {\n            // No response from this node's shard\n            shard_responses.push(CoreShardResponse {\n                shard_id: shard_id as u32,\n                body: serde_json::json!({}),\n                success: false,\n            });\n            failed_shard_ids.push(shard_id as u32);\n            any_degraded = true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok((shard_responses, any_degraded, failed_shard_ids))\n}\n\n/// POST /indexes/:index/search - Search documents.\nasync fn search(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    req: Json<SearchRequest>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n    let query_seq = state.next_query_seq();\n\n    // Extract query before moving req.0\n    let query_value = req.q.clone();\n\n    // Build request body for nodes\n    let req_body = serde_json::to_vec(&req.0).unwrap_or_default();\n\n    let offset = req.offset.unwrap_or(0);\n    let limit = req.limit.unwrap_or(20);\n    let client_requested_score = req.show_ranking_score.unwrap_or(false);\n    let facets = req.facets.clone();\n\n    // Try the primary group first\n    let primary_group_id = query_group(query_seq, state.config.replica_groups);\n    let (mut shard_responses, mut any_degraded, mut failed_shard_ids) = search_with_group(\n        &state,\n        &topology,\n        primary_group_id,\n        &index,\n        &req_body,\n        query_seq,\n        limit,\n        offset,\n        client_requested_score,\n        facets.clone(),\n    )\n    .await?;\n\n    // If we have failed shards and there are other replica groups, try group fallback\n    if !failed_shard_ids.is_empty() && state.config.replica_groups > 1 {\n        let replica_groups = state.config.replica_groups;\n        let mut fallback_attempts = 0;\n        const MAX_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS: u32 = 2; // Limit fallback attempts to avoid cascading\n\n        // Try other groups for the failed shards\n        for fallback_offset in 1..replica_groups as u64 {\n            if fallback_attempts >= MAX_FALLBACK_ATTEMPTS {\n                break;\n            }\n\n            let fallback_group_id = (primary_group_id as u64 + fallback_offset) % replica_groups as u64;\n            if fallback_group_id == primary_group_id as u64 {\n                continue;\n            }\n\n            // Try the fallback group for all failed shards\n            let (fallback_responses, fallback_degraded, fallback_failed) = search_with_group(\n                &state,\n                &topology,\n                fallback_group_id as u32,\n                &index,\n                &req_body,\n                query_seq,\n                limit,\n                offset,\n                client_requested_score,\n                req.facets.clone(),\n            )\n            .await?;\n\n            // Merge the successful responses from fallback into our main responses\n            for (i, shard_resp) in shard_responses.iter_mut().enumerate() {\n                let shard_id = i as u32;\n                if !shard_resp.success && failed_shard_ids.contains(&shard_id) {\n                    // Try to find a successful response from fallback\n                    if let Some(fallback_resp) = fallback_responses.iter().find(|r| r.shard_id == shard_id && r.success) {\n                        shard_resp.body = fallback_resp.body.clone();\n                        shard_resp.success = true;\n                        // Remove from failed list\n                        failed_shard_ids.retain(|&id| id != shard_id);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n\n            if fallback_degraded {\n                any_degraded = true;\n            }\n\n            // Update failed_shard_ids with any new failures from fallback\n            for &shard_id in &fallback_failed {\n                if !failed_shard_ids.contains(&shard_id) {\n                    failed_shard_ids.push(shard_id);\n                }\n            }\n\n            fallback_attempts += 1;\n\n            // If we've recovered all failed shards, stop trying fallbacks\n            if failed_shard_ids.is_empty() {\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Check if we failed completely\n    let successful_count = shard_responses.iter().filter(|s| s.success).count();\n    if successful_count == 0 {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"All shards failed\"));\n    }\n\n    // Merge results\n    let merger = MergerImpl;\n    let merged: MergedResult = merger\n        .merge(shard_responses, offset, limit, client_requested_score)\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    // Check if any shards failed (degraded mode)\n    let degraded = any_degraded || merged.degraded;\n\n    // Build response\n    let search_response = SearchResponse {\n        hits: merged.hits,\n        query: query_value.unwrap_or_default(),\n        limit,\n        offset,\n        estimated_total_hits: merged.total_hits,\n        processing_time_ms: merged.processing_time_ms,\n        facet_distribution: if merged.facets.as_object().map_or(false, |o| !o.is_empty()) {\n            Some(merged.facets)\n        } else {\n            None\n        },\n        ranking_score_threshold: req.ranking_score_threshold,\n    };\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder().status(200);\n\n    // Add degraded header if any shard failed\n    if degraded {\n        if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(\"true\") {\n            builder = builder.header(\"X-Miroir-Degraded\", val);\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder\n        .body(Json(search_response).into_response().into_body())\n        .unwrap())\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_search_request_deserialization() {\n        let json = r#\"{\n            \"q\": \"test\",\n            \"limit\": 10,\n            \"offset\": 0,\n            \"showRankingScore\": true\n        }\"#;\n\n        let req: SearchRequest = serde_json::from_str(json).unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(req.q, Some(\"test\".to_string()));\n        assert_eq!(req.limit, Some(10));\n        assert_eq!(req.offset, Some(0));\n        assert_eq!(req.show_ranking_score, Some(true));\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_search_request_defaults() {\n        let json = r#\"{\"q\": \"test\"}\"#;\n\n        let req: SearchRequest = serde_json::from_str(json).unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(req.q, Some(\"test\".to_string()));\n        assert_eq!(req.limit, None);\n        assert_eq!(req.offset, None);\n        assert_eq!(req.show_ranking_score, None);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_search_response_serialization() {\n        let response = SearchResponse {\n            hits: vec![serde_json::json!({\"id\": \"1\", \"title\": \"Test\"})],\n            query: \"test\".to_string(),\n            limit: 20,\n            offset: 0,\n            estimated_total_hits: 100,\n            processing_time_ms: 15,\n            facet_distribution: Some(serde_json::json!({\"color\": {\"red\": 10}})),\n            ranking_score_threshold: Some(0.5),\n        };\n\n        let json = serde_json::to_string(&response).unwrap();\n        assert!(json.contains(r#\"\"hits\":[{\"#));\n        assert!(json.contains(r#\"\"query\":\"test\"\"#));\n        assert!(json.contains(r#\"\"limit\":20\"#));\n        assert!(json.contains(r#\"\"offset\":0\"#));\n        assert!(json.contains(r#\"\"estimatedTotalHits\":100\"#));\n        assert!(json.contains(r#\"\"processingTimeMs\":15\"#));\n        assert!(json.contains(r#\"\"facetDistribution\":{\"#));\n        assert!(json.contains(r#\"\"rankingScoreThreshold\":0.5\"#));\n nodes_completed: u32,\n86\t    nodes_failed: u32,\n87\t}\n88\t\n89\t/// Tasks list response.\n90\t#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n91\t#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\n92\tstruct TasksListResponse {\n93\t    results: Vec<AggregatedTask>,\n94\t    limit: usize,\n95\t    from: Option<u32>,\n96\t    total: u32,\n97\t}\n98\t\n99\t/// GET /tasks - List all tasks with optional filters.\n100\tasync fn list_tasks(\n101\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n102\t    Query(query): Query<TasksQuery>,\n103\t) -> Result<Json<TasksListResponse>, ErrorResponse> {\n104\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n105\t    let limit = query.limit.unwrap_or(20);\n106\t    let from = query.from;\n107\t\n108\t    // Query all nodes for tasks\n109\t    let mut all_tasks: Vec<NodeTask> = Vec::new();\n110\t    let mut failed_nodes = 0;\n111\t\n112\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n113\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n114\t            let request = ScatterRequest {\n115\t                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n116\t                path: \"/tasks\".to_string(),\n117\t                body: vec![],\n118\t                headers: vec![],\n119\t            };\n120\t\n121\t            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n122\t\n123\t            match scatter\n124\t                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n125\t                .await\n126\t            {\n127\t                Ok(result) => {\n128\t                    if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n129\t                        if resp.status == 200 {\n130\t                            if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<serde_json::Value>(&resp.body) {\n131\t                                if let Some(results) = json.get(\"results\").and_then(|r| r.as_array()) {\n132\t                                    for task_value in results {\n133\t                                        if let Ok(task) = serde_json::from_value::<NodeTask>(task_value.clone()) {\n134\t                                            all_tasks.push(task);\n135\t                                        }\n136\t                                    }\n137\t                                }\n138\t                            }\n139\t                        }\n140\t                    }\n141\t                }\n142\t                Err(_) => {\n143\t                    failed_nodes += 1;\n144\t                }\n145\t            }\n146\t        }\n147\t    }\n148\t\n149\t    // Apply filters if provided\n150\t    let mut filtered_tasks: Vec<NodeTask> = all_tasks;\n151\t\n152\t    if let Some(index_uids) = &query.index_uid {\n153\t        if !index_uids.is_empty() {\n154\t            filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n155\t                .into_iter()\n156\t                .filter(|t| index_uids.contains(&t.index_uid))\n157\t                .collect();\n158\t        }\n159\t    }\n160\t\n161\t    if let Some(statuses) = &query.statuses {\n162\t        if !statuses.is_empty() {\n163\t            filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n164\t                .into_iter()\n165\t                .filter(|t| statuses.contains(&t.status))\n166\t                .collect();\n167\t        }\n168\t    }\n169\t\n170\t    if let Some(types) = &query.types {\n171\t        if !types.is_empty() {\n172\t            filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n173\t                .into_iter()\n174\t                .filter(|t| types.contains(&t.task_type))\n175\t                .collect();\n176\t        }\n177\t    }\n178\t\n179\t    // Aggregate tasks by UID\n180\t    let mut aggregated: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<NodeTask>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n181\t\n182\t    for task in filtered_tasks {\n183\t        aggregated\n184\t            .entry(task.task_uid as u32)\n185\t            .or_insert_with(Vec::new)\n186\t            .push(task);\n187\t    }\n188\t\n189\t    // Convert to aggregated tasks\n190\t    let mut results: Vec<AggregatedTask> = aggregated\n191\t        .into_iter()\n192\t        .map(|(uid, tasks)| {\n193\t            let first = tasks.first().unwrap();\n194\t\n195\t            // Determine overall status\n196\t            let status = if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"failed\") {\n197\t                \"failed\".to_string()\n198\t            } else if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"processing\") {\n199\t                \"processing\".to_string()\n200\t            } else if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"enqueued\") {\n201\t                \"enqueued\".to_string()\n202\t            } else {\n203\t                \"succeeded\".to_string()\n204\t            };\n205\t\n206\t            let nodes_completed = tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"succeeded\").count() as u32;\n207\t            let nodes_failed = tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"failed\").count() as u32;\n208\t\n209\t            AggregatedTask {\n210\t                task_uid: uid as u64,\n211\t                index_uid: first.index_uid.clone(),\n212\t                status,\n213\t                task_type: first.task_type.clone(),\n214\t                enqueued_at: first.enqueued_at.clone(),\n215\t                started_at: first.started_at.clone(),\n216\t                finished_at: first.finished_at.clone(),\n217\t                error: first.error.clone(),\n218\t                details: first.details.clone(),\n219\t                duration: first.duration.clone(),\n220\t                node_count: tasks.len() as u32,\n221\t                nodes_completed,\n222\t                nodes_failed,\n223\t            }\n224\t        })\n225\t        .collect();\n226\t\n227\t    // Sort by task UID descending\n228\t    results.sort_by(|a, b| b.task_uid.cmp(&a.task_uid));\n229\t\n230\t    // Apply from/limit pagination\n231\t    let total = results.len() as u32;\n232\t    if let Some(from_uid) = from {\n233\t        results = results.into_iter().filter(|t| t.task_uid <= from_uid as u64).collect();\n234\t    }\n235\t    results.truncate(limit);\n236\t\n237\t    Ok(Json(TasksListResponse {\n238\t        results,\n239\t        limit,\n240\t        from,\n241\t        total,\n242\t    }))\n243\t}\n244\t\n245\t/// GET /tasks/:uid - Get a specific task.\n246\tasync fn get_task(\n247\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n248\t    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n249\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n250\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n251\t\n252\t    // Parse task UID\n253\t    let task_uid = uid\n254\t        .parse::<u64>()\n255\t        .map_err(|_| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"Invalid task UID\"))?;\n256\t\n257\t    // Query all nodes for this task\n258\t    let mut node_tasks: Vec<NodeTask> = Vec::new();\n259\t    let mut not_found = true;\n260\t\n261\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n262\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n263\t            let request = ScatterRequest {\n264\t                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n265\t                path: format!(\"/tasks/{}\", task_uid),\n266\t                body: vec![],\n267\t                headers: vec![],\n268\t            };\n269\t\n270\t            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n271\t\n272\t            if let Ok(result) = scatter\n273\t                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n274\t                .await\n275\t            {\n276\t                if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n277\t                    if resp.status == 200 {\n278\t                        not_found = false;\n279\t                        if let Ok(json) = Tasks routes: GET /tasks, GET /tasks/:uid, DELETE /tasks/:uid\n//!\n//! Implements task status aggregation per plan §3:\n//! - Per-task ID reconciliation across nodes\n//! - Aggregated status from all nodes\n//! - Task deletion support\n\nuse axum::{\n    extract::{Path, Query, State},\n    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n};\nuse miroir_core::{\n    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    router::write_targets,\n    scatter::{Scatter, ScatterRequest},\n};\nuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\nuse serde_json::Value;\n\nuse crate::{\n    error_response::ErrorResponse,\n    scatter::HttpScatter,\n    state::ProxyState,\n};\n\n/// Tasks router.\npub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n    axum::Router::new()\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::get(list_tasks))\n        .route(\"/:uid\", axum::routing::get(get_task).delete(delete_task))\n}\n\n/// Query parameters for tasks list.\n#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct TasksQuery {\n    #[serde(default)]\n    limit: Option<usize>,\n    #[serde(default)]\n    from: Option<u32>,\n    #[serde(default)]\n    index_uid: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    #[serde(default)]\n    statuses: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    #[serde(default)]\n    types: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    #[serde(default)]\n    canceled_by: Option<u32>,\n}\n\n/// Task response from a single node.\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize, Deserialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct NodeTask {\n    task_uid: u64,\n    index_uid: String,\n    status: String,\n    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n    task_type: String,\n    enqueued_at: String,\n    started_at: Option<String>,\n    finished_at: Option<String>,\n    error: Option<Value>,\n    details: Option<Value>,\n    duration: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Aggregated task response.\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct AggregatedTask {\n    task_uid: u64,\n    index_uid: String,\n    status: String,\n    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n    task_type: String,\n    enqueued_at: String,\n    started_at: Option<String>,\n    finished_at: Option<String>,\n    error: Option<Value>,\n    details: Option<Value>,\n    duration: Option<String>,\n    // Miroir-specific fields\n    node_count: u32,\n    nodes_completed: u32,\n    nodes_failed: u32,\n}\n\n/// Tasks list response.\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"camelCase\")]\nstruct TasksListResponse {\n    results: Vec<AggregatedTask>,\n    limit: usize,\n    from: Option<u32>,\n    total: u32,\n}\n\n/// GET /tasks - List all tasks with optional filters.\nasync fn list_tasks(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Query(query): Query<TasksQuery>,\n) -> Result<Json<TasksListResponse>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n    let limit = query.limit.unwrap_or(20);\n    let from = query.from;\n\n    // Query all nodes for tasks\n    let mut all_tasks: Vec<NodeTask> = Vec::new();\n    let mut failed_nodes = 0;\n\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: \"/tasks\".to_string(),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            match scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n            {\n                Ok(result) => {\n                    if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                        if resp.status == 200 {\n                            if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<serde_json::Value>(&resp.body) {\n                                if let Some(results) = json.get(\"results\").and_then(|r| r.as_array()) {\n                                    for task_value in results {\n                                        if let Ok(task) = serde_json::from_value::<NodeTask>(task_value.clone()) {\n                                            all_tasks.push(task);\n                                        }\n                                    }\n                                }\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n                Err(_) => {\n                    failed_nodes += 1;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Apply filters if provided\n    let mut filtered_tasks: Vec<NodeTask> = all_tasks;\n\n    if let Some(index_uids) = &query.index_uid {\n        if !index_uids.is_empty() {\n            filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n                .into_iter()\n                .filter(|t| index_uids.contains(&t.index_uid))\n                .collect();\n        }\n    }\n\n    if let Some(statuses) = &query.statuses {\n        if !statuses.is_empty() {\n            filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n                .into_iter()\n                .filter(|t| statuses.contains(&t.status))\n                .collect();\n        }\n    }\n\n    if let Some(types) = &query.types {\n        if !types.is_empty() {\n            filtered_tasks = filtered_tasks\n                .into_iter()\n                .filter(|t| types.contains(&t.task_type))\n                .collect();\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Aggregate tasks by UID\n    let mut aggregated: std::collections::HashMap<u32, Vec<NodeTask>> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for task in filtered_tasks {\n        aggregated\n            .entry(task.task_uid as u32)\n            .or_insert_with(Vec::new)\n            .push(task);\n    }\n\n    // Convert to aggregated tasks\n    let mut results: Vec<AggregatedTask> = aggregated\n        .into_iter()\n        .map(|(uid, tasks)| {\n            let first = tasks.first().unwrap();\n\n            // Determine overall status\n            let status = if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"failed\") {\n                \"failed\".to_string()\n            } else if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"processing\") {\n                \"processing\".to_string()\n            } else if tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"enqueued\") {\n                \"enqueued\".to_string()\n            } else {\n                \"succeeded\".to_string()\n            };\n\n            let nodes_completed = tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"succeeded\").count() as u32;\n            let nodes_failed = tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"failed\").count() as u32;\n\n            AggregatedTask {\n                task_uid: uid as u64,\n                index_uid: first.index_uid.clone(),\n                status,\n                task_type: first.task_type.clone(),\n                enqueued_at: first.enqueued_at.clone(),\n                started_at: first.started_at.clone(),\n                finished_at: first.finished_at.clone(),\n                error: first.error.clone(),\n                details: first.details.clone(),\n                duration: first.duration.clone(),\n                node_count: tasks.len() as u32,\n                nodes_completed,\n                nodes_failed,\n            }\n        })\n        .collect();\n\n    // Sort by task UID descending\n    results.sort_by(|a, b| b.task_uid.cmp(&a.task_uid));\n\n    // Apply from/limit pagination\n    let total = results.len() as u32;\n    if let Some(from_uid) = from {\n        results = results.into_iter().filter(|t| t.task_uid <= from_uid as u64).collect();\n    }\n    results.truncate(limit);\n\n    Ok(Json(TasksListResponse {\n        results,\n        limit,\n        from,\n        total,\n    }))\n}\n\n/// GET /tasks/:uid - Get a specific task.\nasync fn get_task(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Parse task UID\n    let task_uid = uid\n        .parse::<u64>()\n        .map_err(|_| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"Invalid task UID\"))?;\n\n    // Query all nodes for this task\n    let mut node_tasks: Vec<NodeTask> = Vec::new();\n    let mut not_found = true;\n\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/tasks/{}\", task_uid),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            if let Ok(result) = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n            {\n                if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                    if resp.status == 200 {\n                        not_found = false;\n                        if let Ok(json) = serde_json::from_slice::<serde_json::Value>(&resp.body) {\n                            if let Ok(task) = serde_json::from_value::<NodeTask>(json) {\n                                node_tasks.push(task);\n                            }\n                        }\n                    } else if resp.status == 404 {\n                        // Task not found on this node\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    if not_found {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::invalid_request(format!(\"Task {} not found\", uid)));\n    }\n\n    if node_tasks.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::invalid_request(format!(\"Task {} not found\", uid)));\n    }\n\n    // Aggregate task status\n    let first = node_tasks.first().unwrap();\n    let status = if node_tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"failed\") {\n        \"failed\".to_string()\n    } else if node_tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"processing\") {\n        \"processing\".to_string()\n    } else if node_tasks.iter().any(|t| t.status == \"enqueued\") {\n        \"enqueued\".to_string()\n    } else {\n        \"succeeded\".to_string()\n    };\n\n    let nodes_completed = node_tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"succeeded\").count() as u32;\n    let nodes_failed = node_tasks.iter().filter(|t| t.status == \"failed\").count() as u32;\n\n    let aggregated = AggregatedTask {\n        task_uid: first.task_uid,\n        index_uid: first.index_uid.clone(),\n        status,\n        task_type: first.task_type.clone(),\n        enqueued_at: first.enqueued_at.clone(),\n        started_at: first.started_at.clone(),\n        finished_at: first.finished_at.clone(),\n        error: first.error.clone(),\n        details: first.details.clone(),\n        duration: first.duration.clone(),\n        node_count: node_tasks.len() as u32,\n        nodes_completed,\n        nodes_failed,\n    };\n\n    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::OK, Json(aggregated)).into_response())\n}\n\n/// DELETE /tasks/:uid - Cancel/delete a task.\nasync fn delete_task(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(uid): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Parse task UID\n    let task_uid = uid\n        .parse::<u64>()\n        .map_err(|_| ErrorResponse::invalid_request(\"Invalid task UID\"))?;\n\n    // Broadcast delete to all nodes\n    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n\n    if targets.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n    }\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"DELETE\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/tasks/{}\", task_uid),\n        body: vec![],\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n    let result = scatter\n        .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| update_setting_with_rollback(\n124\t    state: &ProxyState,\n125\t    index: &str,\n126\t    setting_path: &str,\n127\t    value: &Value,\n128\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n129\t    let available\"));\n134\t    }\n135\t\n136\t    // Step 1: Fetch current values from all nodes for rollback\n137\t    let mut rollback_values: std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n138\t\n139\t    for target in &targets {\n140\t        let get_request = ScatterRequest {\n141\t            method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n142\t            path: HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n148\t\n149\t        match scatter.scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], get_request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await {\n150\t            Ok(resp) => {\n151\t                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n152\t                    let original_value = if r.status == 200 {\n153\t                        Some(serde_json::from_slice(&r.body).unwrap_or(Value::Null))\n154\t                    } else {\n155\t                        None\n156\t                    };\n157\t                    rollback_values.insert(\n158\t                        target.as_str().to_string(),\n159\t                        RollbackValue {\n160\t                            original_value,\n161\t                            existed: r.status == 200,\n162\t                        },\n163\t                    );\n164\t                }\n165\t            }\n166\t            Err(_) => {\n167\t                // Node is already down, skip rollback for it\n168\t                rollback_values.insert(target.as_str().to_string(), RollbackValue {\n169\t                    original_value: None,\n170\t                    existed: false,\n171\t                });\n172\t            }\n173\t        }\n174\t    }\n175\t\n176\t    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(value).unwrap_or_default();\n177\t\n178\t    let request = ScatterRequest {\n179\t        method: \"PUT\".to_string(),\n180\t        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n186\t\n187\t    // Track successful nodes for rollback\n188\t    let mut successful_nodes: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n189\t    let mut last_response: Option<Value> = None;\n190\t\n191\t    // Sequential broadcast with rollback on failure\n192\t    for target in &targets {\n193\t        let result = scatter\n194\t            .scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], request.clone(), UnavailableShardPolicy::Error)\n195\t            .await;\n196\t\n197\t        match result {\n198\t            Ok(resp) => {\n199\t                if let Some(r) let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&r.body).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n203\t                        last_response = Some(body);\n204\t                    } else {\n205\t                        //              r.status\n211\t                        )));\n212\t                    }\n213\t                }\n214\t            }\n215\t            Err(e) => {\n216\t                // Rollback from successful nodes\n217\t                rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n218\t                return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n219\t                    \"Failed to update setting on node {}: {}\",\n220\t                    target.as_str(),\n221\t                    e\n222\t                )));\n223\t            }\n224\t        }\n225\t    }\n226\t\n227\t    let response_body = if let Some(body) = last_response {\n228\t        body\n229\t    } else {\n230\t        let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n231\t        serde_json::json!({\n232\t            \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n233\t            \"indexUid\": index,\n234\t            \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n235\t            \"type\": \"settingsUpdate\",\n236\t            \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n237\t        })\n238\t    };\n239\t\n240\t    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::ACCEPTED, Json(response_body)).into_response())\n241\t}\n242\t\n243\t/// Rollback a setting from nodes that were successfully updated.\n244\tasync fn rollback_setting(\n245\t    state: &ProxyState,\n246\t    topology: &miroir_core::topology::Topology,\n247\t    successful_nodes: &[String],\n248\t    rollback_values: &std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue>,\n249\t    index: &str,\n250\t    setting_path: &str,\n251\t) {\n252\t    for node_id in successful_nodes {\n253\t        if let Some(rollback) = rollback_values.get(node_id) {\n254\t            let node_id_ref = miroir_core::topology::NodeId::new(node_id.clone());\n255\t            if rollback.existed {\n256\t                // Restore original value\n257\t                if let Some(original) = &rollback.original_value {\n258\t                    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(original).unwrap_or_default();\n259\t                    let _ = state\n260\t                        .client\n261\t                        .send_to_node(\n262\t                            topology,\n263\t                            &node_id_ref,\n264\t                            \"PUT\",\n265\t                            &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n266\t                            Some(&body_bytes),\n267\t                            &[],\n268\t                        )\n269\t                        .await;\n270\t                }\n271\t            } else {\n272\t                // Setting didn't exist before, delete it\n273\t                let _ = state\n274\t                     &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n280\t                        None,\n281\t                        &[],\n282\t                    )\n283\t                    .await;\n284\t            }\n285\t        }\n286\t    }\n287\t}\n288\t\n289\t/// GET /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\n290\tasync fn get_filterable_attributes(\n291\t    State(state):     if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n583\t            let request = ScatterRequest {\n584\t                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n585\t                path: HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n591\t\n592\t            let result = scatter\n593\t                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"Invalid JSON response\"))?;\n601\t                    return Ok(Json(value));\n602\t                } else if resp.status == 404 {\n603\t                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(index));\n604\t                }\n605\t            }\n606\t        }\n607\t    }\n608\t\n609\t    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(index))\n610\t}\n611\t\n612\t/// Generic DELETE handler for resetting a setting to default.\n613\tasync fn delete_setting(\n614\t    state: &ProxyState,\n615\t    index: &str,\n616\t    setting_path: &str,\n617\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n618\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n619\t    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n620\t\n621\t    if targets.is_empty() {\n622\t        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n623\t    }\n624\t\n625\t    let request = ScatterRequest {\n626\t        method: \"DELETE\".to_string(),\n627\t        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n628\t        body: vec![],\n629\t        headers: vec![],\n630\t    };\n631\t\n632\t    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n633\t    let result = scatter\n634\t        .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n635\t        .await\n636\t        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n637\t\n638\t    if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n639\t        let status = axum::http::StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(axum::http::StatusCode::OK);\n640\t        let value: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n641\t            .unwrap_or_else(|_| Value::Null);\n642\t        return Ok((status, Json(value)).into_response());\n643\t    }\n644\t\n645\t    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::ACCEPTED, Json(serde_json::json!({}))).into_response())\n646\t}\n647\t\n648\t#[cfg(test)]\n649\tmod tests {\n650\t\n651\t    #[test]\n652\t    fn test_filterable_attributes_injection() {\n653\t        let input       }\n675\t        }\n676\t\n677\t        // Should not duplicate\n678\t        assert_eq!(updated, input);\n679\t Settings routes: GET, PATCH, DELETE /indexes/:index/settings\n//!\n//! Implements settings broadcast per plan §3:\n//! - Sequential apply-with-rollback on failure\n//! - Broadcast to all nodes\n//! - Rollback from successful nodes if any fail\n\nuse axum::{\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n};\nuse miroir_core::{\n    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    router::write_targets,\n    scatter::{Scatter, ScatterRequest},\n};\nuse serde_json::Value;\n\nuse crate::{\n    error_response::ErrorResponse,\n    scatter::HttpScatter,\n    state::ProxyState,\n};\n\n/// Settings router.\npub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n    axum::Router::new()\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::get(get_all_settings))\n        .route(\n            \"/filterable-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_filterable_attributes).put(update_filterable_attributes).delete(delete_filterable_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/searchable-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_searchable_attributes).put(update_searchable_attributes).delete(delete_searchable_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/sortable-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_sortable_attributes).put(update_sortable_attributes).delete(delete_sortable_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/displayed-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_displayed_attributes).put(update_displayed_attributes).delete(delete_displayed_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/ranking-rules\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_ranking_rules).put(update_ranking_rules).delete(delete_ranking_rules),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/stop-words\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_stop_words).put(update_stop_words).delete(delete_stop_words),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/synonyms\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_synonyms).put(update_synonyms).delete(delete_synonyms),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/distinct-attribute\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_distinct_attribute).put(update_distinct_attribute).delete(delete_distinct_attribute),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/typo-tolerance\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_typo_tolerance).put(update_typo_tolerance).delete(delete_typo_tolerance),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/faceting\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_faceting).put(update_faceting).delete(delete_faceting),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/pagination\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_pagination).put(update_pagination).delete(delete_pagination),\n        )\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index/settings - Get all settings.\nasync fn get_all_settings(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Query first available node\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings\", index),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            let result = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                if resp.status == 200 {\n                    let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n                        .unwrap_or_else(|_| Value::Null);\n                    return Ok(Json(body));\n                } else if resp.status == 404 {\n                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index));\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index))\n}\n\n/// Cached original value for rollback.\nstruct RollbackValue {\n    /// The original value to restore on rollback.\n    original_value: Option<Value>,\n    /// Whether the setting existed before.\n    existed: bool,\n}\n\n/// Generic handler for updating a setting with rollback.\nasync fn update_setting_with_rollback(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    index: &str,\n    setting_path: &str,\n    value: &Value,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n\n    if targets.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n    }\n\n    // Step 1: Fetch current values from all nodes for rollback\n    let mut rollback_values: std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for target in &targets {\n        let get_request = ScatterRequest {\n            method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n            body: vec![],\n            headers: vec![],\n        };\n\n        let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n        match scatter.scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], get_request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await {\n            Ok(resp) => {\n                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n                    let original_value = if r.status == 200 {\n                        Some(serde_json::from_slice(&r.body).unwrap_or(Value::Null))\n                    } else {\n                        None\n                    };\n                    rollback_values.insert(\n                        target.as_str().to_string(),\n                        RollbackValue {\n                            original_value,\n                            existed: r.status == 200,\n                        },\n                    );\n                }\n            }\n            Err(_) => {\n                // Node is already down, skip rollback for it\n                rollback_values.insert(target.as_str().to_string(), RollbackValue {\n                    original_value: None,\n                    existed: false,\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(value).unwrap_or_default();\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"PUT\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n        body: body_bytes,\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n    // Track successful nodes for rollback\n    let mut successful_nodes: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n    let mut last_response: Option<Value> = None;\n\n    // Sequential broadcast with rollback on failure\n    for target in &targets {\n        let result = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], request.clone(), UnavailableShardPolicy::Error)\n            .await;\n\n        match result {\n            Ok(resp) => {\n                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n                    if (200..300).contains(&r.status) {\n                        successful_nodes.push(target.as_str().to_string());\n                        let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&r.body).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n                        last_response = Some(body);\n                    } else {\n                        // Rollback from successful nodes\n                        rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n                        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n                            \"Failed to update setting on node {}: status {}\",\n                            target.as_str(),\n                            r.status\n                        )));\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            Err(e) => {\n                // Rollback from successful nodes\n                rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n                return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n                    \"Failed to update setting on node {}: {}\",\n                    target.as_str(),\n                    e\n                )));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let response_body = if let Some(body) = last_response {\n        body\n    } else {\n        let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n        serde_json::json!({\n            \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n            \"indexUid\": index,\n            \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n            \"type\": \"settingsUpdate\",\n            \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n        })\n    };\n\n    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::ACCEPTED, Json(response_body)).into_response())\n}\n\n/// Rollback a setting from nodes that were successfully updated.\nasync fn rollback_setting(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    topology: &miroir_core::topology::Topology,\n    successful_nodes: &[String],\n    rollback_values: &std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue>,\n    index: &str,\n    setting_path: &str,\n) {\n    for node_id in successful_nodes {\n        if let Some(rollback) = rollback_values.get(node_id) {\n            let node_id_ref = miroir_core::topology::NodeId::new(node_id.clone());\n            if rollback.existed {\n                // Restore original value\n                if let Some(original) = &rollback.original_value {\n                    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(original).unwrap_or_default();\n                    let _ = state\n                        .client\n                        .send_to_node(\n                            topology,\n                            &node_id_ref,\n                            \"PUT\",\n                            &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n                            Some(&body_bytes),\n                            &[],\n                        )\n                        .await;\n                }\n            } else {\n                // Setting didn't exist before, delete it\n                let _ = state\n                    .client\n                    .send_to_node(\n                        topology,\n                        &node_id_ref,\n                        \"DELETE\",\n                        &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n                        None,\n                        &[],\n                    )\n                    .await;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\nasync fn get_filterable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    get_setting(&state, &index, \"filterable-attributes\").await\n}\n\n/// PUT /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\nasync fn update_filterable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    body: Json<Value>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    // Ensure _miroir_shard is always in filterable attributes\n    let mut updated = body.0.clone();\n    if let Some(arr) = updated.as_array_mut() {\n        if !arr.iter().any(|v| v.as_str() == Some(\"_miroir_shard\")) {\n            arr.push(serde_json::json!(\"_miroir_shard\"));\n        }\n    }\n    update_setting_with_rollback(&state, &index, \"settings/filterable-attributes\", &updated).await\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\nasync fn delete_filterable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    // Reset to default but always include _miroir_shard\n    let default = serde_json::json!([\"_miroir_shard\"]);\n    update_setting_with_rollback(&state, &index, \"settings/filterable-attributes\", &default).await\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index/settings/searchable-attributes\nasync fn get_searchable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    get_setting(&state, &index, \"settings/searchable-attributes\").await\n}\n\n/// PUT /indexes/:index/settings/searchable-attributes\nasync fn update_searchable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    body: Json<Value>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    update_setting_with_rollback(&state, &index, \"settings/searchable-attributes\", &body.0).await\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/:index/settings/searchable-attributes\nasync fn delete_searchable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) ->
